title: GitHub Actions runs static + e2e harness gates on every PR
description: Two-job workflow at .github/workflows/harness.yml: 'static' (ubuntu, ~1 min — typecheck/lint/jest/schema + harness invariants) runs on every push and PR; 'e2e-ios' (macos, ~10–20 min — boot sim, prebuild + xcodebuild Release, run Maestro smoke flow, upload artifacts) runs on main pushes or PRs labelled 'e2e'. Invariants live in scripts/harness-ci-checks.sh.
verification: Push a branch to GitHub; the 'static' job runs and exits 0
Open a PR against main; both 'static' (required) and (with 'e2e' label) 'e2e-ios' jobs trigger
Stray `.only` in a test fails the 'harness invariants' step
A `done` feature with empty commitSha fails the 'static' job
When 'e2e-ios' runs, it uploads a `maestro-ios-<run-id>` artifact
notes: Closed via PR #3. Static + e2e-ios both green on the merge commit. Originally id `ci-001`.
